We know from the triage context that enabling smart cards in SSSD requires:
  - Setting pam_cert_auth to True under the [pam] section in /etc/sssd/sssd.conf

  - Also adding or updating "pam_sss.so" line in the auth section of "/etc/pam.d/smartcard-auth"

Therefore, the fix must involve:
  1. Modifying /etc/sssd/sssd.conf to set pam_cert_auth = True in the [pam] section.
  2. Ensuring that in /etc/pam.d/system-auth, the auth section includes pam_sss.so with try_cert_auth or require_cert_auth.
  3. Ensuring that in /etc/pam.d/smartcard-auth, the auth section includes pam_sss.so.
